title: Neon alley cybergrind
text: Megacity alleys, chrome debt, and corpo patents on your bloodstream.

title: Space salvage frontier
text: Dead ships, thin air, and crews that share oxygen more carefully than secrets.

title: System-apocalypse UI weather
text: After the break, menus overlay reality; quests are weather systems with body counts.

title: Solarpunk repair commons
text: Green roofs, shared tools, and conflicts about water rights rather than empire maps.

title: Mecha hangar academy
text: Cadets, frame calibrations, and exams that can crush steel and careers.

title: Fragile colony sim
text: A young colony where oxygen, food, and morale are the three real bosses.

title: Station time-loop grind
text: A looped day on a station; only skill growth and scars seem to stick.

title: Arcology floor 214
text: A vertical city block owned by one brand; elevators are class systems.

title: Derelict hull market
text: A market in a dead freighter; gravity is optional, honesty is expensive.

title: Data-slum undergrid
text: Cables for streets; people sell bandwidth and blood for uplink minutes.

title: Spoke-station customs
text: A station where customs is a religion and contraband is a dialect.

title: Crashed server-cathedral
text: A building grown around a fallen mainframe; pilgrims ask questions that still compile.

title: Leaking greenhouse dome
text: A dome farm where oxygen politics grow faster than vegetables.

title: Brand security detail
text: Corporate security that smiles with non-lethal policies and lethal exceptions.

title: Alley runner crew
text: A small netrunner crew that trades exploits like recipes and debts like currency.

title: Vacuum salvage union
text: Union rules on who may cut a hull; scabs float, sometimes literally.

title: Interface clergy
text: People who interpret status windows as scripture and sell blessed UI skins.

title: Jackport static sense
text: Feel nearby active ports as scalp static; useful, noisy, and migraine-prone.

title: Suit-seal double-check
text: A near-useless habit of rechecking seals that compounds when vacuum is real risk.

title: Drone nudge protocol
text: Nudge a civilian drone one meter off course; military drones ignore you until upgraded.

title: Menu-edge flicker read
text: See half a second of system menu chrome others miss; often garbage, rarely gold.

title: Scrap-solder jury rig
text: Solder dead boards into temporary life; smell of ozone means success or fire.

title: Adblock blink filter
text: Blink-filter one ad overlay; corporate AR fights back with brighter lies.
examples: clear a door sign for a second

title: Cold late quest log
text: Objectives update late and omit the price; verify with sensors, not faith.

title: Diegetic implant HUD
text: HUD is an implant with ads, legal disclaimers, and optional lying overlays.

title: Scarce skill-node tree
text: Skill nodes are few and gated by materials, mentors, or crime, not free level spam.

title: Chrome cynicism
text: Witty, tired, and allergic to corporate hope slogans; still capable of small loyalties.

title: First window at dawn
text: Sky cracks or network dies; a window appears over a practical crisis: water, air, rent.

title: Cryo pod unpaid balance
text: Wake from cryo with a debt invoice stuck to the glass and a station you do not recognize.

title: Hangar exam sabotage
text: Your frame fails calibration mid-exam; the fault looks personal.
